title: Department of Financial Affairs - About Us
content:
Department of Financial Affairs - About Us

Financial Affairs Department, which is one of the basic units of the university;

Through automation and systems established for student and personnel transactions,

Student Records,

SSI transactions,

Staff Salary payments,

Buying processes,

and similar transactions by following the current legal changes by the Labor Law No. 4857, Higher Education Legislation No. 2547 and the Presidency of the Council of Higher Education, and regulates all business transactions of the University in financial matters.

In addition, it aims to use existing resources in the most appropriate and efficient way, to fulfill, plan and implement services and activities in the most economical and effective way.

This content was updated on 17/09/2024.
